benefits.description: Dark hair growth returned during use; darker hair regrowth observed over 2 cycles

side_effects.description: Grey hair regrew after stopping TB-500, with regrowth cycle approximately 1 month

protocol_notes: Ran 2 cycles of TB-500. Observed that effect was not permanent; grey hair regrew after discontinuation on approximately 1 month growth cycle. Suggests potential for lasting effect with continued use.
